title: AronMav/hydeclaw
summary: Self-hosted AI gateway for personal agents. Rust core + TypeScript channels + Python media hub. 28 LLM providers, 6 chat channels, multi-agent orchestration, long-term memory, encrypted secrets vault.

title: mattmre/AGENT33
summary: Autonomous AI agent orchestration engine with local-first runtime, explicit governance, and extensible workflow automation. FastAPI backend with Ollama-powered LLM integration.

title: adrianliechti/wingman
summary: Inference Hub for AI at Scale

title: siddsachar/Thoth
summary: Thoth - Personal AI Sovereignty. A local-first AI assistant with integrated tools, a personal knowledge graph, voice, vision, shell, browser automation, scheduled tasks, health tracking, and messaging channels. Run locally via Ollama or add opt-in cloud models. Your data stays on your machine.

title: dcostenco/prism-coder
summary: The Mind Palace for AI Agents - HIPAA-hardened Cognitive Architecture with on-device LLM (prism-coder:7b), Hebbian learning, ACT-R spreading activation, adversarial evaluation, persistent memory, multi-agent Hivemind and visual dashboard. Zero API keys required.

title: sddcinfo/auto-sre
summary: Local LLM server management for Claude Code — runs Ollama / llama.cpp / vLLM behind a native Anthropic Messages API proxy. Ships with a plan-review hook (closed-loop plan→review→update), bash guard, local MCP web fetch/search, and an optional HTTPS file dropbox. No cloud API keys required.

title: FPSZ/Memori-Vault
summary: Local-first memory engine for personal and team knowledge, combining semantic chunking, vector retrieval, and asynchronous Graph-RAG on Ollama + SQLite. 本地优先的个人与团队记忆引擎，集成语义分块、向量检索与异步 Graph-RAG（Ollama + SQLite）。

title: vaibhavpandeyvpz/hooman
summary: Hooman is a hackable AI agent toolkit for local workflows.

title: pipeshub-ai/pipeshub-ai
summary: PipesHub is a fully extensible and explainable workplace AI platform for enterprise search and workflow automation

title: Oolab-labs/patchwork-os
summary: MCP bridge between Claude Code and your IDE (170+ tools — LSP, debugger, terminal, git). Optional Patchwork OS layer adds recipes, approval queue, and oversight dashboard.

title: hwdsl2/docker-ollama
summary: Docker image to run an Ollama local LLM server. Secure by default, all API requests require a Bearer token (auto-generated on first start). OpenAI-compatible API. Supports first-start model pre-pull, NVIDIA GPU (CUDA) acceleration, and persistent model storage. Multi-arch: amd64, arm64.

title: Gamattention/llm-top
summary: ⚡ htop for LLM inference. Live terminal monitoring for vLLM and friends — tokens/sec, KV cache, TTFT, TPOT, all in one TUI.

title: garudust-org/garudust-agent
summary: Self-improving AI agent built in Rust — persistent memory, skills, multi-platform gateway and cron scheduling

title: zs001-agi/asi-api
summary: Wutong ASI API: self-evolving AI, 5 local models, pay-per-token. 🧬 Powered by asi-evolve & code-opt-ai

title: KERNlang/kern
summary: MCP review engine with 148 rules (taint tracking, OWASP LLM01, concept model) + universal IR compiler: .kern compiles to 13 targets including Next.js, Vue, Express, and FastAPI. AGPL-3.0.

title: adrianwedd/spark
summary: SPARK — a Claude-powered robot companion for a neurodivergent kid. Built on SunFounder PiCar-X + Raspberry Pi.

title: hwdsl2/docker-litellm
summary: Docker image for a self-hosted LiteLLM AI gateway proxy. Unified OpenAI-compatible API for 100+ LLM providers. Features auto-config on first start, virtual key management, spend tracking, and persistent data via Docker volume.

title: zenetio/openclaw-rpi
summary: Deployment guides and scripts for running OpenClaw on Raspberry Pi with Ollama over LAN

title: Sungblab/opencairn-monorepo
summary: Self-hosted, AI-agent-driven knowledge OS — multi-LLM (Gemini/Ollama), 12 agents, knowledge graph, real-time collaboration. AGPLv3.

title: DryadeAI/Dryade
summary: Self-hosted AI orchestration platform. Connect any LLM, orchestrate agents, build workflows — all on your infrastructure.
